name: news-fact-checker-marketplace
description: Fact-check news articles by URL — reads bot-blocked sites via insane-search, cross-verifies claims against multiple independent sources, and renders a Korean verdict report.

plugins.name: news-fact-checker
plugins.description: 뉴스 URL 팩트체크 — 차단 사이트는 insane-search로 우회하여 읽고, 다중 독립 출처 교차검증으로 사실/거짓 판별. Fact-check a news article by URL with source cross-verification.
